evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2500);try{MOS.nav('catalogo')}catch(e){}await w(3000);const fr=document.querySelector('.fac-itemrow');const off=[...document.querySelectorAll('body *')].filter(el=>{const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();return r.width>0&&r.right>innerWidth+2&&getComputedStyle(el).position!=='fixed';}).length;return{m:'catalogo',vw:innerWidth,docOverflow:document.documentElement.scrollWidth>innerWidth+1,elemsOffscreen:off,facCols:fr?getComputedStyle(fr).gridTemplateColumns:null};})()
